recent_projects.name: slurmray
recent_projects.summary: SlurmRay is an official tool from DESI @ HEC UNIL for effortlessly distributing tasks on Slurm clusters (e.g., Curnagl) or standalone servers (e.g., ISIPOL09/Desi) using the Ray library.
recent_projects.author: Henri Jamet
